creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
diff -urN --to-file=nano-devel nano-old/Makefile nano-devel/Makefile
--- nano-old/Makefile	2009-09-30 15:21:26.000000000 +0200
+++ nano-devel/Makefile	2009-09-30 15:20:02.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	nano
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.10
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.11
 CATEGORIES=	editors
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.nano-editor.org/dist/v2.1/ \
 		http://www.ewtoo.org/~astyanax/nano/dist/v2.1/
diff -urN --to-file=nano-devel nano-old/distinfo nano-devel/distinfo
--- nano-old/distinfo	2009-09-30 15:21:28.000000000 +0200
+++ nano-devel/distinfo	2009-09-30 15:21:37.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (nano-2.1.10.tar.gz) = f55bd9efeccf9da98950b54a4b0d872e
-SHA256 (nano-2.1.10.tar.gz) = 03af11adace9f6c482a06f5304c5aba5d134972a416ce4368307b604420b2e40
-SIZE (nano-2.1.10.tar.gz) = 1478204
+MD5 (nano-2.1.11.tar.gz) = 15d8c0717c646de2e946e1eb408feec7
+SHA256 (nano-2.1.11.tar.gz) = 3da7f1005f225a295be59aa25fa18ef0bb2017b6bc49646a0c6a275d29c1ea25
+SIZE (nano-2.1.11.tar.gz) = 1488769
